item.title: Ronan Androgenic: Brisbane looksmaxxing influencer arrested during livestream
item.description: Ronan Androgenic has become a rising star among a generation increasingly obsessed with extreme beauty improvement.

item.title: New washing machines to feature dual start function for child safety
item.description: The change follows a fatal accident in New Zealand in 2021.

item.description: ‘Sam deserves what’s happening to her.’

item.description: ‘It’s very intimidating and can feel really scary.’

item.title: St Kilda coach Ross Lyon issues emotional apology for ‘casual racism’ comment at training
item.description: The coach offered to consider his position after hurting his Indigenous players with the remark.

item.title: Carlton club doctor Matt Chamberlain takes leave amid Elijah Hollands investigation
item.description: The respected medical professional is also considering his legal options as the investigation continues.

item.title: Pre-dawn Russian drone attack on Odesa in Ukraine wounds 14
item.description: The drones hit residential neighbourhoods and civilian infrastructure in a key Black Sea port city.

item.title: Aussie veteran Josh Hazlewood produces bowling masterpiece in IPL win over Delhi Capitals
item.description: The 35-year-old has continued his hot form since returning from injury.

item.title: Gosnells grandmother struck by car and killed during walk just 100m from home
item.description: ‘You were loved. You were special. You will be missed greatly.’

item.title: King Charles and Queen Camilla US tour: The royals welcomed by US President Donald Trump to begin the four-day visit
item.description: Their arrival comes as much of the capital remains on edge in the wake of Saturday’s White House shooting.

item.title: Man and woman fighting for life after house fire in Brassall, Ipswich
item.description: Four other people were assessed by paramedics at the scene.

item.title: How Victoria’s 20 per cent car registration rebate will work and how much you can save
item.description: Motorists have two months to apply for the rebate before it closes. Here is everything you need to know.

item.title: My Reno Rules: Emma & Michelle and Julia & Nathan go head-to-head amid accusations of idea stealing
item.description: ‘We tried to stay unique and now there’s nothing to show for it.’

item.title: King Charles to promote UK-US unity in rare speech to Congress during four-day state trip
item.description: The address will be only the second by a British sovereign to the US Congress.

item.title: Family of Finnish construction worker killed in Brisbane scaffolding accident demand answers
item.description: ‘Nobody should go to work and never come back.’

item.description: Staff were moving stock when the fatal incident happened.

item.description: ‘I cannot thank you enough for the hope and encouragement.’

item.title: The Agenda Setters stocks after R7: Buy, hold and sell
item.description: ‘That is not what they brought.’

item.title: Would you eat this? Woolworths shoppers divided over marked-down pack of grey-toned mince
item.description: From ‘already rotten’ to ‘still safe to eat’, the off-colour mince has sparked a beef online.

item.description: ‘Decisions like that feel like they just set us back.’

item.description: Two men trained in martial arts stepped in until police arrived.

item.description: ‘It is in the wrong place, at the wrong time, for too long.’

item.title: New advice on catch-up moves to start building wealth in your 40s, 50s and beyond
item.description: ‘It’s never too late.’

item.title: Four minutes of daily movement could help prevent type 2 diabetes, study finds
item.description: A new study reveals the surprisingly simple daily habit that could slash your risk of type 2 diabetes by more than a third.

item.title: Prince and Princess of Wales William and Kate share family photo to mark 15th wedding anniversary
item.description: The Prince and Princess of Wales have marked their 15th wedding anniversary.

item.description: ‘That’s the only information I have at this stage.’

item.title: King and a joker: Charles disarms US hosts with quips at state dinner in Washington
item.description: ‘King George never set foot in America and, please rest assured, I am not here as part of some cunning rearguard action.’

item.title: Man arrested after two stabbed in London Jewish area Golders Green
item.description: Prime Minister Keir Starmer said ‘attacks on our Jewish community are attacks on Britain’.

item.title: Conspiracy theories run rife after Donald Trump assassination attempt
item.description: Was the US president’s attempted assassination staged to bolster support for his new $400 million ballroom? That’s what some people believe.

item.description: The Lions co-captain still recalls the three questions he was asked by the first-time coach.

item.description: Players are set to be informed of the situation this week.

item.description: Nine months after the tragedy, two small boxes were given to the widow and mother.

item.description: The controversy began when the snowboarder’s wife said she wanted to go on a girls’ trip.

item.title: Cathy MacGuinness: Husband’s heartbreaking tribute to Sydney mother-of-three who died weeks after giving birth
item.description: The 40-year-old died of cardiac arrest linked to an undiagnosed heart condition, prompting a warning to women.

item.title: Much-loved Queensland jockey Shane McGovern undergoes second leg amputation in ‘devastating’ update
item.description: The ‘tough as nails’ Aussie faces a long recovery after getting trapped under his horse in a freak accident.

item.description: No charges have been laid.

item.title: Toxic black mould fears put Queensland’s Logan Police Station at risk of shutdown, with officers relocated amid health concerns
item.description: Two officers fell ill and one later died, with his family alleging mould exposure was the cause.

item.description: ‘She wants to know why… why is she losing her hair, why does it have to be her that’s going bald?’

item.description: The 36-year-old claims he believed the 13-year-old was over the age of consent when they had sex in a car park toilet.

item.description: Optus remains on top for NBN speeds, but the ACCC’s latest report shows a lower‑profile budget telco has quietly climbed into second place.

item.description: First Toyota, now Kia. The Seltos is the Korean brand's first model to go hybrid-only in Australia, despite multiple powertrains available overseas.

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: Volkswagen open to selling developed-for-China models abroad
item.description: Volkswagen is hoping to turn its fortunes in China around with an army of new locally-developed models, some of which could end up overseas.

item.title: Born-again V8 Jensen GT car named
item.description: A new V8-powered fastback GT will debut in mid-2026, with Jensen confirming its name and releasing a second teaser image.

item.title: Rocket-boosted Dreame electric supercar claimed to hit 100km/h in 0.9 seconds
item.description: The Nebula Next 01 Jet Edition is an experimental electric vehicle that could be the first car to reach 100km/h in less than one second.

item.title: Middle East war: Donald Trump ‘not satisfied’ with Iran’s latest proposal to end conflict
item.description: A US Navy blockade stopping Iran’s tankers from getting out to sea has the country’s economy reeling.

item.title: GWM following Toyota’s playbook for electrification
item.description: A focus on long-term development and a range of different powertrain technologies will help power GWM's future growth, the company says.

item.title: Nicole Kidman is learning how to be a death doula role but what do they actually do? One Sydney practitioner reveals all
item.description: Kidman’s interest in the idea sprouted when her mother passed away. Here’s what they really do.

item.title: Dumpster diving: How Brisbane family saves $10,000 a year doing weekly grocery ‘shop’ from bins
item.description: ‘Some people think it’s disgusting, others are like good on you.’

item.title: Brisbane Lions’ brutal notes about Essendon players exposed ahead of Marvel Stadium clash
item.description: Details about the struggling stars have been uncovered after they were accidentally left on a whiteboard.

item.title: Luckless Rabbitoh Brandon Smith sidelined for another month
item.description: ‘He’s pretty disappointed, to be honest.’

item.title: Mother of two siblings killed in car crash unleashes on father of driver over cover-up
item.description: ‘I do not believe there is a place in heaven or hell that can hold the weight of your actions.’

item.title: Texas plane crash kills pilot and four pickleball players flying to tournament
item.description: All five people on board the plane were pronounced dead at the scene.

item.title: Wayne Bennett predicts major ‘blow-up’ over PNG’s salary cap
item.description: ‘Personally, I think that’s really unfair.’

item.title: Middle East war: US asks for help opening Strait of Hormuz as Trump slams allies
item.description: The US President blasted allied countries as they were issued a new proposal.

item.title: AFL world rallies around cursed St Kilda star Max King after injury in the VFL
item.description: ‘Unluckiest player on any list in the AFL.’

item.title: Centrelink payments should be increased amid cost of living crisis, government agency says
item.description: A deteriorating situation has highlighted a ‘critical need’ among recipients.

item.title: Global Sumud Flotilla: Six Australian Gaza flotilla detainees freed by Israel days after interception off Greece
item.description: ‘If we didn’t comply, they said they would open fire.’

item.title: Man airlifted to hospital in critical condition after alleged stabbing in Merrigum, Victoria
item.description: Two men have been arrested in relation to the alleged attack.

item.title: Donald Trump pulls thousands of troops from Germany as rift widens between the countries over Iran war
item.description: Trump’s growing anger with Germany has continued to put pressure on diplomatic ties.

item.title: Nun is attacked in streets of Jerusalem, sparking outcry from Christian leaders
item.description: ‘Violence against innocent individuals, and especially against members of religious communities, has no place in our society.’

item.title: Brad Scott explains shock omission of Elijah Tsatas as Bombers slump to heavy loss to Brisbane
item.description: The coach said the youngster wasn’t a ‘scapegoat’, but fans weren’t buying it.

item.title: Residents frustrated and businesses struggle as continued Great Western Highway closure begins to sting
item.description: ‘These pressures simply can’t be absorbed. Without targeted support, many businesses will not make it.’

item.title: Shattered veteran Dion Prestia limps off as Richmond’s injury crisis claims another victim
item.description: The 33-year-old lasted a matter of minutes and is now facing a lengthy stint on the sidelines.

item.title: 7NEWS The Issue Podcast: Major parties ‘evaporating’ as Farrer by-election set to rattle Canberra
item.description: ‘The pain and the hardship that exists in our regional communities is profound, and we will see it shake up this election.’

item.title: Motorsport icon turned Paralympic gold medallist Alex Zanardi dies aged 59
item.description: ‘A great champion and an extraordinary man.’

item.title: Autistic teen bashed by gang of youths while trying to make friends in Camdenville Park, St Peters
item.description: The 15-year-old was trying to make friends when he was set upon by a group of youths.

item.title: Australian households feeling the strain as groceries overtake rent, mortgage as most stressful bill
item.description: Meals that were once budget-conscious are now double the price.

item.title: Cats unleash final-quarter blitz to make it 15 straight over Kangaroos
item.description: The match was in the balance until the hosts put the foot down in the last term.

item.title: Stand rule causes confusion as Richmond finally end losing streak with thrilling win over West Coast
item.description: A crucial 50m penalty in the dying stages has played a pivotal role in the result.

item.title: Music star Tash Sultana’s latest cancer battle helping family friend after teenage apprentice’s diagnosis
item.description: ‘It’s not something ... you want to experience when you’re that young, let alone ever.’

item.title: Baby named in honour of Queensland paramedic who saved Gold Coast grandmother’s life
item.description: ‘We’re sharing a moment with someone ... and it’s often the worst moment of their life.’

item.title: Warriors overcome Eels but halves puzzle remains as starting pair Tanah Boyd and Chanel Harris-Tavita shine
item.description: Star half Luke Metcalf watched from the bench in the first half as his teammates took control.

item.title: Gold Coast Pro halted after shark sighting as Jack Robinson among five Aussies to progress on eventful day
item.description: Two competitors were in the water when event officials leapt into action.

item.title: Carlton slump to another second-half capitulation as St Kilda romp to big win
item.description: The pressure on Michael Voss will reach fever pitch after yet another fade-out.

item.title: Liberals take key by-election win in seat of Nepean ahead of Victoria’s poll
item.description: ‘This is the honour of my life to be standing here.’

item.title: Roosters hold on as Broncos fall short of record comeback in NRL thriller
item.description: Reece Walsh nearly inspired a miracle after Brisbane conceded the first 30 points.
